title: narcissus × calathinus var. triandrus
intro: Narcissus × calathinus var. triandrus, also known as Triandrus narcissus, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is known for its fragrant, bell-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Triandrus narcissus can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, such as dried flowers, tinctures, or infused oils, which can be used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
